questionHtml: Calculate the amount, in DKK, that will be left to exchange after commission.
markschemeHtml:
0.95 × 3450       (M1)

Note: Award (M1) for multiplying 3450 by 0.95 (or equivalent).

3277.50 (DKK)       (A1) (C2)

Note: The answer must be given to two decimal places unless already penalized in part (a).

[2 marks]

meta.title: Calculate the amount, in DKK, that will be left to exchange after commission.
